name: Certified Trapper
description: '''Daishun Graham''' (born 2001), known by his stage name '''Certified Trapper''', is an American rapper and record producer known for his 2023 track "Oi (Beat Da Koto Nai)", and his affiliation with Michigan rapper [[BabyTron]]. He is a pioneer of [[lowend]] music. Since 2020, Graham has released over 30 albums comprising over 300 songs. As of April 2024, Graham was signed to [[Jeff Vaughn]]'s Signal Records, an imprint of [[Columbia Records]].{{Citation needed|date=May 2026}}
